titleStmt.title: SII 26.218: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 218. (A.R. No. 206 of 1909.) NAMBIYŪR, GOBICHETTIPALAYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same temple.

This inscription records a gift of a sandhyā lamp and a sum of 10 paṇam to provide oil for it, to the deity Tāntōṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyār of Nambipērūr by the wife of the Brāhmaṇa Pūman Sōman of Kāśuva (Kāśyapa)-gōtra belonging to Paṭṭāli in Kāṅgaiya-nāḍu. The temple-right-owning Brāhmaṇas Āṇḍān Śella-bhaṭṭan alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-nambi of Bhāradvāja-gōtra and Āḻvān Vañjagaṟkāyan alias Vañjanāyaka-bhaṭṭan received the gifts and agreed to do the service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu kāṅkaiya
nāṭṭup paṭṭāliyiṟ pirāmaṇan kācuva-kottirattil pūman
coman māṉakkiḻatti nampiperuril Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉā tānto
nṟuyicuramuṭaiyāṟkuc canti tipam Oṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟkāṇiyuṭaiya civa
(va)ppirāmaṇa pārattuvāca kottirattil Āṇṭān cellappaṭṭanāṉa
tirucciṟṟampalanampiyum Āḻvān vañcakaṟkāyā nāna vañcanāyakapaṭṭanum
Ivviruvom yivar pakkal Upaiyamākak koṇṭa paṇam pattum cantiyā tipam O
nṟum kuṭaṅkoṇṭu koyil pukuvar cantirātittavarai celuttuvor Itu pan
māheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 26.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
